{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/npp-v1-0/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "npp-v1-0"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. npp-v1-0

_Файлов:_ 19

h2. Содержание

* [[00-abstract-status|00-abstract-status.md]] — 
* [[01-introduction|01-introduction.md]] — 
* [[02-terminology|02-terminology.md]] — 
* [[03-registry|03-registry.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[04-passport|04-passport.md]] — 
* [[05-compatibility-levels|05-compatibility-levels.md]] — 
* [[06-adapter-interface|06-adapter-interface.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[07-portal-entry|07-portal-entry.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [[08-consensus-algorithm|08-consensus-algorithm.md]] — 
* [[09-query-flow|09-query-flow.md]] — 
* [[10-query-result|10-query-result.md]] — 
* [[11-security-considerations|11-security-considerations.md]] — 
* [[12-versioning-policy|12-versioning-policy.md]] — 
* [[13-reference-implementation|13-reference-implementation.md]] — 
* [[14-adr-001-federation-over-merging|14-adr-001-federation-over-merging.md]] — 
* [[15-glossary|15-glossary.md]] — 
* [[16-appendix-a-minimal-working-example|16-appendix-a-minimal-working-example.md]] — 
* [[17-appendix-b-change-log|17-appendix-b-change-log.md]] — 
* [[18-comment-on-document|18-comment-on-document.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.60)
* [[22-10-queryresult-structure]] (сходство 0.17)
* [[22-10-queryresult-structure]] (сходство 0.16)
